final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo of a French romantic bedroom scene with a four-poster bed and Paris street view outside the window.

Style/medium: editorial interior photography, French romantic style, soft vintage aesthetic reminiscent of Parisian apartments
Composition: medium shot from the foot of the bed, slightly angled to capture both the four-poster bed and the window view, natural perspective
Subject: four-poster bed with flowing sheer canopy drapes, vintage vanity table with ornate mirror, scattered rose petals on bed and floor
Scene/backdrop: Parisian bedroom interior with tall windows, Eiffel Tower or classic Haussmann buildings visible outside, morning atmosphere
Lighting/mood: soft morning sunlight filtering through sheer curtains, warm and diffused, creating an elegant and languid atmosphere
Color palette: warm cream and ivory as base, soft rose pink accents, muted gold touches, gentle morning light tones
Materials/textures: flowing linen and silk fabrics, polished antique wood, delicate lace, soft rose petals, sheer voile curtains
Avoid: harsh shadows, modern furniture, cluttered composition, oversaturated colors, plastic textures, watermark
